name: Baicang
description: Incantation tank with ink-and-verse gravitas; fights feel deliberate, almost ceremonial, as he shoulders pressure so allies can keep weaving their skills.

seo.title: Baicang — Defense
seo.description: Baicang brings Incantation defense to Neverness to Everness—wordcraft flair, stoic presence, and a front-row role built around control and composure.
